title: Construction of Chapter
doc_html:
§4720.72.  Construction of Chapter

This Chapter, being necessary for the welfare of the state and its residents, shall be liberally construed to effect the purposes thereof.

Acts 2005, No. 437, §1, eff. July 11, 2005.

§4720.72.  Construction of Chapter
This Chapter, being necessary for the welfare of the state and its residents, shall be liberally construed to effect the purposes thereof.
Acts 2005, No. 437, §1, eff. July 11, 2005.
